title: Implement independent FNV-1a32 hash_32() oracle matching hash_32.json
description: Add to python/src/lichen/sim/tdma.py or dedicated hash util. Must exactly match test vectors using basis 0x811c9dc5. Independent oracle, no self-test. See hash_32.json and spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:2a.3.1
close_reason: Added independent FNV-1a32 hash_32() to lichen.sim.tdma (and exported via __init__) matching hash_32.json and Rust impl exactly. No comments, follows style. Tests match vectors. Updated last-touched.
